news_items.headline: I finally found a use case for OpenClaw…
news_items.summary:
[Fireship · 362K views] Get up to 67% off OpenClaw VPS hosting with Hostinger's one-click template. Use code FIRESHIP for an extra discount - https://hostinger.com/openclawfireship

Back in January, OpenClaw's wild rise triggered a nation-wide Mac mini shortage and a record number of security advisories. But just last week, Peter Steinberger spoke about fixing its vulnerabilities to a room full of devs at AI Engineer Europe, and he convinced me to give it another shot.

#coding #programming #ai #openclaw

🔖 Topics Cove

news_items.headline: What is Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform?
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 29K views] Ready to take your AI development to the next level? Discover how the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform gives developers a clean path from writing their first lines of code to running secure, scalable agents in production. Join Holt Skinner as he dives into the complete agent lifecycle, and be sure to check out the linked resources below to try out the tutorials for yourself.

GitHub repository (tutorials/notebooks) → https://goo.gle/agent-platform-github
Agent Development Kit (ADK) → https://goo

news_items.headline: DeepSeek Just Did It Again
news_items.summary:
[Prompt Engineering · 19K views] DeepSeek V4 just dropped with two massive models, 1.6 trillion and 284 billion parameters, and the Pro version rivals closed source giants like GPT-5.5 and Opus 4.6 while using only 27% of the compute. In this video, I break down the benchmarks, architectural innovations, and real world coding tests so you can see exactly where this model shines and where it still needs work.

https://x.com/deepseek_ai/status/2047516922263285776

My Dictation App: www.whryte.com
Website: https://engineerprompt.a

news_items.headline: From the Next ‘26 main stage to the terminal
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 11K views] Our opening keynote at #GoogleCloudNext will tell you what’s possible—then we’ll show you how to build it.

Join us for a livestream immediately following the day 1 keynote for a breakdown of the announcements and get hands-on-keyboard with Google product leaders, customers, and GDEs. 

This livestream originally aired on April 22, 2026 at 11:00 A.M. PDT / 2:00 P.M. EDT.

9:02 - Intro
15:24 - Jason Davenport x Addy Osmani x Dave Elliott

news_items.headline: Next ‘26 Developer keynote deep-dive
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 7K views] The #GoogleCloudNext Developer Keynote will show you some of the latest advancements in AI and cloud tech. Immediately after, we are taking the tech to the terminal.

For this livestream, we’ll be live coding agentic workflows and testing new announcements in real world scenarios with Google product leaders, customers, and GDEs. 

Don’t just watch the keynote, plan to build it with us.

This livestream originally aired on April 23, 2026 at 12:00 P.M. PDT / / 3:00 P.M. EDT.

news_items.headline: Why does bias exist in AI models?
news_items.summary: [Claude · 6K views] Today, we dive into political bias as one type of bias that may exist in models. Learn why it may occur, what we do about it, and tactics you can use to spot this in your conversations.

news_items.headline: האם אנחנו בבועה? ביקרנו במוח של הבינה המלאכותית בישראל
news_items.summary:
[TrashTech · 5K views] השבוע בטראשטק יצאנו מהאולפן לסיור מיוחד במפעל של המהפכה התעשייתית החדשה - דאטה סנטר ה-AI הענק (והראשון בישראל!) של חברת נביוס!

כמה חשמל דורשת שאלה פשוטה שאנחנו שואלים את הצ׳אט? איך באמת נראה ונשמע המקום שמריץ את הפרומפטים שלנו? (ספויילר: היינו צריכים לשים אטמי אוזניים) והאם אנחנו בבועת AI שעומדת להתפוצץ, או שזו רק ההתחלה של מהפכה טכנולוגית אדירה?
_________________________
על מעלית הבינה שמעתם? הכירו את הפורמט החדש מבית טראשטק - 30 יזמים, 30 קומות, 30 יוזקייסים על AI.
היכנסו עכשיו - https://link

news_items.headline: Explore a high-scale agentic AI-powered simulation sandbox with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
news_items.summary:
[Google for Developers · 2K views] Learn how to use Google Cloud with cutting edge agentic technologies to create a simulation sandbox for a city looking to plan and host a marathon. You will learn how to combine Agent Development Kit with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AlloyDB and Gemma to orchestrate multiple agents for planning, evaluating and simulating a city-scale event.

Resources: 
Link to Solution → https://goo.gle/4tjZqPe 
Code Repo →https://goo.gle/3QfjCDa 

Subscribe to Google for Developers → https://goo.gle/devel
